field.label: Name
field.help: Alphanumeric name for this tunnel (e.g. myvpn)

field.label: Private Key
field.help: Your private key. Use the generate button (gear icon) to create a new keypair.

field.label: Tunnel Address
field.help: Interface address assigned by the server, e.g. 10.8.1.2/24

field.label: DNS
field.help: DNS servers. Leave empty — OPNsense Unbound handles DNS.

field.label: MTU
field.help: Leave empty for default (1420). Reduce to 1280-1380 if experiencing issues with large packets.

field.label: Jc
field.help: Number of junk packets sent before each handshake (1-128). From server config.

field.label: Jmin
field.help: Minimum junk packet size in bytes. From server config.

field.label: Jmax
field.help: Maximum junk packet size in bytes. From server config.

field.label: S1
field.help: Extra bytes added before init message. From server config.

field.label: S2
field.help: Extra bytes added before response message. From server config.

field.label: H1
field.help: Magic header for init packets. From server config.

field.label: H2
field.help: Magic header for response packets. From server config.

field.label: H3
field.help: Magic header for cookie packets. From server config.

field.label: H4
field.help: Magic header for data packets. From server config.

field.label: Public Key
field.help: Server public key. From server config.

field.label: Pre-Shared Key
field.help: Optional pre-shared key for additional security. From server config.

field.label: Endpoint
field.help: Server IP address and port, e.g. 1.2.3.4:51820

field.label: Allowed IPs
field.help: Use 0.0.0.0/0 to route all traffic. For selective routing, use 0.0.0.0/0 here and configure Firewall Rules with a specific gateway.

field.label: Keepalive
field.help: Send keepalive packet every N seconds (e.g. 25). Required when behind NAT.
